name: Grip it and Rip it Golf Sims
address: 3377 S County Trl, East Greenwich, RI 02818
about: Grip it and Rip it Golf Sims is an indoor golf venue in South County, Rhode Island, offering a premier experience with top-of-the-line technology and a comfortable, private space. The facility features FlightScope Mevo+ launch monitors and E6 Connect software, providing a realistic, responsive golf simulation experience without weather or tee time constraints. It is suitable for solo practice, casual rounds with friends, and various events, with bays available for 60-90 minute sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade FlightScope Mevo+ launch monitors providing detailed real-time swing data
Access to over 90 world-famous golf courses including Pinehurst, Bay Hill, and Torrey Pines via E6 Connect
BYOB-friendly get-togethers in a private space perfect for practice or play
Easy online booking system with flexible time slots

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor providing real-time data on ball speed, club path, launch angle, and spin

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs as the venue provides everything else you need to get started.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is BYOB-friendly, allowing you to bring your own drinks. No mention of outside food is made.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Most players book for 60-90 minutes depending on group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is welcoming to beginners and offers a low-pressure setting for learning, making it suitable for families and kids.
